hero.title_line1: Helping Children Learn, Grow, and Communicate in English
hero.subtitle: I'm Rahma Elsadek — a kindergarten English teacher who turns first words into first steps of confidence.

about.title: 1 year teaching young learners
about.body: I began my career as a Student of the Accounting Institute — but my heart kept pulling me toward classrooms, That passion for teaching children and language led me to leave accounting behind and build a new career around what I love most: helping young learners fall in love with English.
about.quote: Numbers taught me precision. Children taught me patience. Together, they made me the teacher I am today.

accounting.title: Accounting Institute
accounting.detail: Graduated with a foundation in accounting before transitioning toward education.

kindergarten.title: English Teacher, Kindergarten Academy
kindergarten.detail: One year of hands-on classroom experience teaching young learners.
responsibilities: Helping children build strong English foundations

Certificates.title: Certificates & Achievements
Certificates.description: Professional training and certifications that support my journey as an English Teacher.

english_course.title: English Language Course
english_course.description: Completed a comprehensive English language program focused on communication and language development.

diploma.title: English Teaching Diploma
diploma.description: Specialized training in teaching methodologies, classroom management, and child-centered education.

strengths.title: What I bring to the classroom.

patient.title: Patient with Children
patient.detail: Every child learns at their own pace, and I meet them there.

management.title: Strong Classroom Management
management.detail: A calm, structured space where children feel safe to participate.

creative.title: Creative Learning Activities
creative.detail: Games and activities that make English lessons memorable.

child_centered.title: Child-Centered Approach
child_centered.detail: Lessons designed around how children actually learn best.

positive.title: Positive Learning Environment
positive.detail: Encouragement first, so confidence grows alongside vocabulary.

philosophy.quote: My goal is to help every child enjoy learning English and gain confidence in using the language.

contact.title: Hiring for your school?
contact.body: I'd love to talk about how I can help your youngest students build confidence in English from day one.
contact.footer_note: Available for kindergarten & early-years English teaching positions.
